settings.title: Terms & Conditions
settings.text:
Last updated: 23 February 2026

Welcome to Bubble Me. This website (www.bubbleme.in) is operated by Derma Lush LLP (“Bubble Me”, “we”, “us”, “our”). By accessing or using the Site and/or purchasing from us, you agree to these Terms & Conditions (“Terms”).

Account information

If you create an account or place an order, you agree to provide accurate, complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activity under your account.

Products, information & usage

We try to display product details, images, and descriptions as accurately as possible. However:

  • Product appearance (colour/texture/packaging) may vary slightly due to lighting, screen settings, and batch updates.
  • Product information is for general wellness and personal care use. It is not medical advice.
  • Always read the label and follow usage directions and cautions.

Prices & payments

  • Prices are listed in INR unless stated otherwise.
  • Prices, offers, and availability may change without notice.
  • Payments are processed via secure third‑party payment gateways. We do not store full card details.
  • If a product is listed at an incorrect price due to an error, we may cancel the order and refund the amount.

Orders & acceptance

  • Placing an order does not guarantee acceptance.
  • We may refuse or cancel an order due to stock unavailability, suspected fraud, address verification issues, or other operational reasons.
  • If we cancel after payment is captured, we will refund as per our refunds timeline.

Shipping & delivery

Shipping timelines and charges are detailed in our Shipping & Delivery Policy. Delivery timelines are estimates and can vary due to courier delays, weather, or serviceability.

Returns, replacements, refunds & cancellations

Returns/refunds/replacements/cancellations are governed by our Returns, Refunds & Cancellations Policy. Certain items may be non‑returnable due to hygiene and safety reasons.

Intellectual property

All content on the Site (logos, product names, graphics, text, photos, videos, designs) is owned by or licensed to Bubble Me and is protected under applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or exploit any content without written permission.

User content (reviews, comments, submissions)

If you submit reviews or content, you grant Bubble Me a non‑exclusive, royalty‑free right to use, reproduce, and display that content for marketing and communication purposes, unless prohibited by law.

Prohibited use

You agree not to:

  • Use the Site for unlawful purposes
  • Attempt to hack, scrape, or disrupt the Site
  • Upload malware or harmful code
  • Misrepresent your identity or misuse promotions

Third‑party links

The Site may contain links to third‑party websites/marketplaces. We are not responsible for their content or policies.

Disclaimer & limitation of liability

  • The Site and products are provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis.
  • To the maximum extent permitted by law, Bubble Me shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
  • Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the product(s) giving rise to the claim.

Indemnity

You agree to indemnify and hold Bubble Me harmless from claims, losses, liabilities, and expenses arising from your misuse of the Site, violation of these Terms, or infringement of any rights.

Governing law & jurisdiction

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Courts in Panchkula, Haryana shall have jurisdiction, subject to applicable law.

Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised “Last updated” date.
